title: Analytics - Fit Test Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when Fit Test screen is opened in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device to open Device Settings.
In Device Settings, locate and tap on 'Fit Test' (or navigate to Audio Settings → Fit Test if applicable).
Observe that the Fit Test screen opens.
expected: An analytics event is logged when the Fit Test screen is opened. The event should include the following data fields: event count, country, gender, sessions, app version, build, and environment.
